core_principles: Speed & Clarity: Information must be digestible in milliseconds (for drivers)
High Contrast: Black, White, and Electric Yellow for maximum outdoor visibility
Fluid Motion: The map is the hero; UI floats above it like a HUD
Tactile Feedback: Buttons should feel 'pressable' with clear active states

typography.instructions: Use Chivo for all Headings (h1-h4). It has a strong, automotive character. Use Public Sans for body text, inputs, and data to ensure maximum legibility.

primary.name: Taxi Yellow
primary.usage: Primary Actions (Book Ride, Accept), Active States, Highlights

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD700] text-black hover:bg-[#FACC15] font-bold rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-black text-black hover:bg-gray-100 font-bold rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none

cards.style: bg-background border border-border shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6
cards.driver_panel: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-background border-t border-border rounded-t-3xl shadow-xl p-6 z-50 transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out

inputs.style: h-12 bg-background border-2 border-input focus:border-black focus:ring-0 rounded-md font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground

map_integration.styles: CartoDB.Voyager (Light) or CartoDB.DarkMatter (Dark) for clean, distraction-free maps.
map_integration.car_marker: Use 'react-leaflet-animated-marker' for smooth car movement. Use a custom SVG icon for the car (yellow/black chevron or top-down car vector).

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (User, MapPin, CreditCard, Menu, X, Check, Bell, Navigation).

animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
animations.drawer_slide: initial={{ y: '100%' }} animate={{ y: 0 }} exit={{ y: '100%' }} transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to flat, high-contrast colors.
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44px for mobile drivers.
Use Skeleton loaders instead of spinners for data fetching states.
Always provide a 'Back' button in sub-views on mobile.
Map must be full-screen on mobile, with UI overlaid.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
